Audit event schema & lifecycle points.question: Event fields
Audit event schema & lifecycle points.answer: Rich metadata — agent name, adapter type, snapshot ID, event-specific data

Audit event schema & lifecycle points.question: Event type structure
Audit event schema & lifecycle points.answer: Union of typed dataclasses (typed subtypes per event)

Audit event schema & lifecycle points.question: Outcome values
Audit event schema & lifecycle points.answer: Four outcomes: success / failure / rollback / skipped

Audit event schema & lifecycle points.question: Concrete event list approval
Audit event schema & lifecycle points.answer: Approved: 17 events across 8 categories (pipeline lifecycle, step exec, budget, validation, rollback, parallel, snapshot, signature)

Sink failure model.question: Behavior on sink failure
Sink failure model.answer: ERROR-level log (visible), pipeline continues. Fire-and-forget with loud error.
